entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SPRINKLES AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SPRINKLES IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTH IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
